title: erigeron × helveticus
intro: Erigeron × helveticus, also known as Snow-in-Summer, is a hybrid perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Erigeron × helveticus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Snow-in-Summer can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin conditions.
